title: Mercacraft
description: Joke mod with references to a store in Spain.
body:
What is it about?

The mod adds Mercacraft, an abandoned store where you can find lentils and paella. Additionally, you can also discover a new ore, uranium. With uranium, you can make pizza and JOSH.

Context

This mod was created during a livestream; I added ideas from my community to the mod, which is why it's so quirky. The mod is a joke; it's not a serious project. Stream: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Mzzrlfdz__Y

Credits

Sanx, PekeUranga, Supernoob, Comejiax and me (restonic4).

Required mods

Architectury api and RestApi
